description: This is a very stylish black color V-neck collar top, with a balloon Fit bottom. Perfect for a get-together party, or hwile going for an outing with friends, or even for a movie. For a perfect attire team it up with skinny fit denim and accessorize it with a long neck piece! Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size S in t-shirts 2. Height-5.8", Chest-32", Waist-26"
